domain: toys, model-making, hobby robotics, tabletop games, and mechanical hobby kits

ideas.product_context: A modular tabletop marble run set where users rearrange square tiles to create maze paths.
ideas.core_function: Guides a small ball through channels with adjustable gates and junctions.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined maze tile with recessed tracks, locating pins, gate slots, and underside connector pockets.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires nested grooves, variable-depth channels, filleted intersections, small alignment features, and functional clearances for moving inserts.

ideas.product_context: A hobby mechanical toy kit assembled by children or model makers.
ideas.core_function: Converts spring-driven rotary motion into alternating leg movement.
ideas.likely_main_part: Central crank frame with axle bosses, cam slots, leg pivot holes, and spring motor mounting points.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests linked pivot geometry, mirrored but offset features, compact bearing surfaces, thin ribs, and tolerance-sensitive rotating interfaces.

ideas.product_context: A scale model-making kit for building a small suspended cable car display.
ideas.core_function: Carries a tiny cabin along a taut cord using grooved wheels.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined trolley carriage with pulley forks, axle holes, hanger bracket, and cabin attachment tabs.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines curved wheel-clearance pockets, thin fork arms, coaxial holes, load-bearing brackets, and constrained assembly interfaces.

ideas.product_context: An accessory for board games that tracks points, turns, or resources.
ideas.core_function: Allows a player to rotate numbered dials while keeping the selected value indexed.
ideas.likely_main_part: Dial housing plate with concentric recesses, detent pockets, viewing windows, and snap-fit axle posts.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests concentric circular geometry, partial cutouts, repeated detent features, layered moving parts, and visible alignment windows.

ideas.product_context: A small robotics kit end-effector for picking up lightweight classroom objects.
ideas.core_function: Opens and closes two fingers using a servo-driven linkage.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined gripper palm with servo pocket, linkage pivots, finger stops, and mounting flange.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires precise servo geometry, nontrivial pivot spacing, mechanical travel limits, symmetric linkage mounts, and compact clearance envelopes.

ideas.product_context: A mechanical scenery kit for tabletop terrain or educational bridge models.
ideas.core_function: Raises and lowers a small bridge deck using side trunnions and a crank.
ideas.likely_main_part: Bridge hinge tower with bearing sockets, crank axle supports, deck stops, and base connector slots.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests structural towers, aligned hinge bores, stop surfaces, assembly slots, and parts that must represent both static and moving constraints.

ideas.idea_title: Programmable peg cam music box kit
ideas.product_context: A hands-on mechanical kit where users arrange pegs to trigger small levers or chimes.
ideas.core_function: Rotates a drum with removable pegs that actuate followers in sequence.
ideas.likely_main_part: Cylindrical cam drum with radial peg holes, end bearing journals, indexing marks, and drive coupling.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Challenges cylindrical feature placement, repeated radial hole patterns, indexing references, rotational symmetry, and detachable component interfaces.

ideas.product_context: A non-motorized model-making kit for constructing a small workshop crane.
ideas.core_function: Allows a boom to pivot and a hook carriage to slide along a short rail.
ideas.likely_main_part: Boom rail extrusion with hinge clevis, trolley groove, stop blocks, and cable guide holes.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests long slender parts, sliding-track profiles, hinge clevis geometry, end stops, and mixed load-bearing and decorative detail.

ideas.product_context: An accessory for magnetic construction tiles used to build foldable geometric models.
ideas.core_function: Connects two flat panels while allowing controlled angular rotation.
ideas.likely_main_part: Hinge connector block with magnet pockets, interlocking knuckles, hinge pin bore, and panel seating lips.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires magnet retention cavities, alternating hinge knuckles, coaxial bores, tight panel-fit features, and orientation-specific assembly details.

ideas.product_context: A mechanical expansion module for a desktop marble machine or kinetic sculpture kit.
ideas.core_function: Lifts marbles one step at a time using a hand-cranked ratchet wheel.
ideas.likely_main_part: Ratchet lift wheel with marble pockets, pawl teeth, axle hub, side clearance grooves, and crank interface.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests compound rotational geometry, repeated pockets, asymmetric ratchet teeth, functional clearances, and interaction between continuous curves and discrete indexing features.
